body:
Exoneration No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-y/)
## [Exoneration](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-j/)
We've had a couple of days for it to sink in now. Special Counsel Robert Mueller finally delivered his verdict on alleged collusion between the Trump campaign and the Russians. And Mueller says - no collusion. So, now it's time to put all this behind us, and move on to solving real issues facing our country.Click the link below to read this week's blog post on where I think we go from here. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-i/)
## [I'd Rather Be Us Than Them](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-d/)
We Republicans face ongoing challenges when it comes to winning elections in America nowadays. But in my view, our problems pale in comparison to what the Democrats face. They are more and more becoming the party of socialism. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-k/)
## [Yes, I'm Running](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-u/)
The DCCC put me on their "Retirement Watch List" during the last election cycle. And apparently they or others are trying to peddle rumors that I'm considering retiring again this time around. I'm on the blog today setting the record straight. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-b/)
## [The Democrats Go Fishing](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jiljiue-kujkulhluu-n/)
The Democrats have set off on one of the biggest fishing expeditions in American history. The House Judiciary Committee, which is now under Democrat control, is demanding documents from 81 people who somehow have connections with Donald Trump. name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: It’s started
body:
| | Peter, In 2016, the race between Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton appeared to be one of the toughest in recent history, but I think it’s safe to say it will pale in comparison to what we are about to witness in 2020. More than 16 Democratic candidates have already announced their bid for the presidency, and the list continues to grow. Whether we like it or not, the race for 2020 has begun. Candidates are already hitting the campaign trail, and **now is the time to implement our proven strategy to ensure Christians are engaged.** **We already know the mainstream media won’t be on our side. If we hope to see Christians vote for biblical values, we must start to motivate and equip them now.** Leading up to the last presidential election, My Faith Votes engaged 1.5 million people per day in battleground states. As a result, 85 percent of Christians we reached turned out to vote their values—well above the national average of 55 percent. Our impact increased in 2018, as we equipped Christians with an online voter guide covering all 70,000 elections across the country, from U.S. Senate down to local school boards. **And we can’t overlook what’s happening this year. In 2019, over 81,000 local elections across the nation will be forgotten by most Christians unless we remind them to vote.** We are committed to helping _every_ Christian bring the influence of their faith _every_ election. **[And your investment today will help us reach Christians again in 2019 and 2020](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190328apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190328apl01nd&n=1).** I know it may feel like we often ask for your support. That’s because an effort like this takes significant resources, and this will likely be the most expensive presidential election of our lifetime. The next two years will feel like a marathon, but it’s a race worth running to influence the 25 million Christians who don’t vote. **I want to ask you to prayerfully consider making a special financial contribution today towards a two-year strategy to provide voting resources to millions of Christians.** **We unleash the full power of Christian influence by.**
* **Deploying** cutting edge technology to equip faith voters from any computer or mobile device with access to voter guides and election information for every town in America. We apply data analysis, research, and technology to strategically reach non-voters in key segments and geographies.
* **Leveraging** leading Christian influencers such as Dr. David Jeremiah, Dr. Tony Evans, Alveda King, Kirk Cameron, and others to broadcast messages on television, radio and social media to motivate Christians audiences to vote.
* **Equipping** pastors and church leaders with videos, talking points, bulletin inserts, voter guides, party platform guides, and voter assistance technology, to inform and empower people in the pews to vote.
* **Reaching** the youngest generation of voters with messaging created for Christian university and college campuses and the latest technology to take the friction out of the voting process.

**[When you contribute today](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190328apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190328apl01nd&n=2)** , you are standing shoulder to shoulder with like-minded Christians across the country united in seeing religious liberty upheld, the sanctity of life cherished, and marriage and family values restored. Your donation will impact the 81,000 local elections happening this year and activate the most critical voting block for 2020. .[](https://www3.myfaithvotes.org/p190328apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190328apl01nd&n=3) **United. We Stand.**

Gov. Mike Huckabee
Honorary National Chairman
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e190328apl01nd&n=4)
---

clean_body: | | Peter, In 2016, the race between Donald Trump and Hillary Clinton appeared to be one of the toughest in recent history, but I think it’s safe to say it will pale in comparison to what we are about to witness in 2020. More than 16 Democratic candidates have already announced their bid for the presidency, and the list continues to grow. Whether we like it or not, the race for 2020 has begun. Candidates are already hitting the campaign trail, and now is the time to implement our proven strategy to ensure Christians are engaged. We already know the mainstream media won’t be on our side. If we hope to see Christians vote for biblical values, we must start to motivate and equip them now. Leading up to the last presidential election, My Faith Votes engaged 1.5 million people per day in battleground states. As a result, 85 percent of Christians we reached turned out to vote their values—well above the national average of 55 percent. Our impact increased in 2018, as we equipped Christians with an online voter guide covering all 70,000 elections across the country, from U.S. Senate down to local school boards. And we can’t overlook what’s happening this year. In 2019, over 81,000 local elections across the nation will be forgotten by most Christians unless we remind them to vote. We are committed to helping every Christian bring the influence of their faith every election. . I know it may feel like we often ask for your support. That’s because an effort like this takes significant resources, and this will likely be the most expensive presidential election of our lifetime. The next two years will feel like a marathon, but it’s a race worth running to influence the 25 million Christians who don’t vote. I want to ask you to prayerfully consider making a special financial contribution today towards a two-year strategy to provide voting resources to millions of Christians. We unleash the full power of Christian influence by. Deploying cutting edge technology to equip faith voters from any computer or mobile device with access to voter guides and election information for every town in America. We apply data analysis, research, and technology to strategically reach non-voters in key segments and geographies. Leveraging leading Christian influencers such as Dr. David Jeremiah, Dr. Tony Evans, Alveda King, Kirk Cameron, and others to broadcast messages on television, radio and social media to motivate Christians audiences to vote. Equipping pastors and church leaders with videos, talking points, bulletin inserts, voter guides, party platform guides, and voter assistance technology, to inform and empower people in the pews to vote. Reaching the youngest generation of voters with messaging created for Christian university and college campuses and the latest technology to take the friction out of the voting process. , you are standing shoulder to shoulder with like-minded Christians across the country united in seeing religious liberty upheld, the sanctity of life cherished, and marriage and family values restored. Your donation will impact the 81,000 local elections happening this year and activate the most critical voting block for 2020. . United. We Stand. Gov. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Tax Reform Is No ‘Sugar High’
body:
"The current mantra from opponents of the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act is that the strong economic growth that followed..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=630b8e006a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Tax Reform Is No ‘Sugar High’**

“The current mantra from opponents of the 2017 Tax Cuts and Jobs Act is that the strong economic growth that followed is the result of a ‘sugar high,’” Rep. Kevin Brady (R-TX) and economist Lawrence Lindsey write in _The Wall Street Journal_.

“These arguments reflect political and ideological wishful thinking, not a substantive analysis of what is happening in the economy . . . Thanks to the tax cuts and deregulation, the economy boomed in 2018 _despite_ monetary tightening” from the Federal Reserve, Lawrence and Rep. Brady explain.

[Click here to continue reading.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=976d06755e&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “The fact that President Trump was exonerated of charges of collusion with Russia should be welcome news to any American. However, many Democrats consider it an inconvenient obstruction,” the _[Boston Herald](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8f0d470b7e&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “No investigation, no report, no evidence, will ever satisfy the Democrats that Trump is a legitimate president with whom they must work to accomplish the people’s business.”
---
|
---
| “The nation’s top border security official said Wednesday that the border is at its ‘breaking point’ during a visit to Texas, where as many as 1,000 migrants crossed into the U.S. and there are not enough agents to respond,” Louis Casiano reports for [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5702c89db3&e=3ee4985eea). U.S. Customs and Border Protection Commissioner Kevin K. McAleenan said that “CBP is facing an unprecedented humanitarian and border security crisis.”
---
|
---
| “Of all the reputations in tatters now that Robert Mueller has exploded the Russian-collusion fantasy, Obama-era spy chiefs John Brennan and James Clapper stand out,” the _[New York Post](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c15b5075f2&e=3ee4985eea)_ editorial board writes. “These two weren’t average citizens: They spoke with the authority of having headed federal intel operations”—breaking a longstanding precedent of former top law enforcement officials steering clear of politics.
---
|
---
| “Medicare for All would break a sacred promise and harm seniors’ access to care by forcing a system designed to support them to take on every other American. They deserve a system that helps them get well, not get in line,” Administrator of the Centers for Medicare and Medicaid Services Seema Verma writes in _[The Wall Street Journal](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6840f7c2b6&e=3ee4985eea)_. “The monetary cost of Medicare for All is surpassed by its moral cost. The plan would strip coverage from more than 180 million Americans and force them into government insurance.”
---
|
---
| “President Trump on Wednesday awarded a posthumous Congressional Medal of Honor to U.S. Army Staff Sgt. Travis W. Atkins, who heroically sacrificed his life and saved the lives of three fellow soldiers while fighting in Iraq in 2007,” Emily Ward writes in the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1833ef0ff&e=3ee4985eea)_. “In his final moments on Earth, Travis did not run,” the President said. “He laid down his life to save the lives of his fellow warriors.”
---
|

name: Bob Menendez
subject: Three states short of equal rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MENENDEZ FOR SENATE
body:
Friend,

American men and women are still not guaranteed equal legal rights under the law.

Forty-seven years ago this month, Congress passed the Equal Rights Amendment. But today, the amendment is still three states short of being ratified into the Constitution.

I have been the chief sponsor of the Equal Rights Amendment in the Senate. And I remain committed to enshrining equality for women in the U.S. Constitution.

This Women's History Month, will you join me in the fight for equal rights?

**[If you agree it's well past time our Constitution treats people equally regardless of a person's sex, add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Equal Rights Amendment today.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c9e/74d715b9/19b229c7/1f4bdd88/2883121317/VEsH/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/equal-rights-amendment?gpsid=39_73_5981&source=em19_190328_era_engg_gq_ful_gma_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190328_era_engg_gq_ful_gma_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=1+-+If+you+agree+itrsquos+well+past+time+our")**

Ninety-four percent of Americans support a constitutional amendment that explicitly guarantees Americans equal rights for men and women. Eighty percent of Americans believe women and men are already granted equal rights, but it simply is not the case.

We need to take action and fix this wrong as soon as possible. Women still do not have equal protection from discrimination, and I am set on changing that as a lead sponsor of the Equal Rights Amendment.

**[If you're with me and all women, add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the Equal Rights Amendment today.](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c9e/74d715b9/19b229c7/1f4bdd89/2883121317/VEsE/ "https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/s/equal-rights-amendment?gpsid=39_73_5981&source=em19_190328_era_engg_gq_ful_gma_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190328_era_engg_gq_ful_gma_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=2+-+If+yoursquore+with+me+and+all+women+add+")**

Thank you,

Bob | [DONATE](https://go.menendezfornj.com/page/m/74542c9e/74d715b9/19b229c7/1f4bdd8a/2883121317/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/menendez-march-eoq19?gpsid=39_73_5982&refcode=em19_190328_era_engg_gq_ful_gma_BM_ettx&utm_campaign=em19_190328_era_engg_gq_ful_gma_BM_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bmene&utm_content=3+-+DONATE")

This last month I've been traveling the country hearing from folks from coast-to-coast, and the one thing they have in common is that they know it's time to defeat climate change -- and it needs to be a priority for the next president.
Scientists tell us we have barely a decade to address climate change, and the next president is going to occupy almost half that time behind the desk in the Oval Office. And in the meantime, summers are getting hotter. Droughts are getting worse. Hurricanes are getting stronger, and floods are becoming all too common.
Despite the stakes, I remain optimistic. Because I know America can create a clean energy economy that will harness our ingenuity, create millions of jobs, and solve our climate crisis. We can turn this tide if we fight back NOW. This is our true national emergency, and it deserves to be center stage at the Democratic debates. I hope you agree -- because our future depends on it.
**Let's get to the debate stage together, in June.[Become a debate donor and help us reach our goal of 10,000 new donations by March 31 -- donate $5 or more today. ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-3-31?utm_source=ema_2019-03-28_eoq-ia&refcode=ema_2019-03-28_eoq-ia&utm_campaign=eoq-ia&utm_medium=ema "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eoq-3-31?utm_source=ema_2019-03-28_eoq-ia&refcode=ema_2019-03-28_eoq-ia&utm_campaign=eoq-ia&utm_medium=ema")**
Very truly yours,
Jay

Look, I'm running this campaign differently than others, and that starts with my pledge to you: No fossil fuel money. No corporate PACs.Just you. Now, this is the moment I need you to step up. Your deadline donation will make climate change front and center during the debates: "" If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" "" This last month I've been traveling the country hearing from folks from coast-to-coast, and the one thing they have in common is that they know it's time to defeat climate change -- and it needs to be a priority for the next president. Scientists tell us we have barely a decade to address climate change, and the next president is going to occupy almost half that time behind the desk in the Oval Office. And in the meantime, summers are getting hotter. Droughts are getting worse. Hurricanes are getting stronger, and floods are becoming all too common. Despite the stakes, I remain optimistic. Because I know America can create a clean energy economy that will harness our ingenuity, create millions of jobs, and solve our climate crisis. We can turn this tide if we fight back NOW. This is our true national emergency, and it deserves to be center stage at the Democratic debates. I hope you agree -- because our future depends on it. Let's get to the debate stage together, in June. "" Very truly yours, Jay "" No fossil fuel money. No corporate PACs. Just you. Join our movement to elect a president who will defeat climate change. | ""

subject: The Radicals have taken over...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Gosar for Congress
body:
Nancy Pelosi has lost control of Congress and its now being run by Radicals. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/96fa779a4eaa/the-radicals-have-taken-over?e=7ca82c1e3d)
---
| |
---
| |
**_The Far Left of the Democratic Party is now in control of Congress._**

As dangerous as Speaker of the House Nancy Pelosi is, she’s now merely a puppet for even more dangerous radicals. Ultra-Left Progressives like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez, Ilhan Omar, and Rashida Tlaib.

These brand-new radical members of Congress have pushed the House Democratic Caucus so far to the left, that they are now denouncing capitalism and have fully embraced socialism. **_Policy ideas that were once thought too whacky even for Nancy Pelosi, are now the center piece of the Democratic Congressional Agenda._**

I knew losing control of the House was going to put President Trump’s agenda – and the nation – at risk. But I didn’t expect them to work this fast and propose policies this dangerous.
* **_Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez has proposed the Green New Deal_** , a radical 10-year plan to eliminate all fossil fuels and use 100% renewable energy for everything we depend on. That means no more gasoline-powered cars, no more air travel, and the end of U.S. beef production. **One organization estimated the cost to be as high as $93 trillion!**

* **_Rep. Ilhan Omar has repeatedly made indefensible anti-Semitic comments._** While even senior Democrats have openly blasted Omar for hate speech, Pelosi is afraid to cross and is letting her keep her seat on the House Foreign Affairs Committee, which oversees U.S. support for Israel. And, Pelosi watered down a House Resolution condemning Omar’s hate speech by eliminating any reference to Omar or her words.

_I was one of only 23 Republicans to vote against Pelosi’s cowardly resolution._
* **_On the day Rep. Rashida Tlaib was sworn in as a Member of Congress, she screamed “We are going to Impeach that mother****er!”_** about President Trump.

**__Her. Very. First. Day.__**

And when Pelosi tried to reign in Rep. Tlaib last week by publicly declaring her opposition to Impeachment, Tlaib defied her and said she will Impeach anyway.

When the rank-and-file of the Democratic Congress are too nuts for Nancy Pelosi, you know we are in trouble. And I’m going to fight like hell to stop these radicals from destroying our country.

I am 100% committed to re-electing Donald Trump and Senator Martha McSally, and I will work hard to make sure House Republicans remain committed to conservative principles and retake the House.

**_But I need your help to do that._**

This is my first fundraising effort for 2020 and my campaign fund is nearly empty after the 2018 election. I need to raise $1 million if I am going to hold my seat with all the attacks coming at me for standing up for President Trump.

**_[Will you be the first to support my re-election campaign with a contribution of $1,000, $500, $250, $100, or even $50?](https://gosar4congress.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d959b13e61e10f809478ff16&id=8da5bf3d7f&e=7ca82c1e3d) Every donation helps us meet our goals and ensure that I’m not the next target for Pelosi and George Soros._**

I always pledge to spend your money as frugally as I would my own and commit to you that we will use your donation wisely, and in defense of our conservative principles.

Thank you for your support and your commitment to our cause!

God Bless America,
---

Member of Congress
Arizona's 4th District

Rashida Tlaib was sworn in as a Member of Congress, she screamed “We are going to Impeach that mother**er!” about President Trump. Her. Very. First. Day. And when Pelosi tried to reign in Rep. Tlaib last week by publicly declaring her opposition to Impeachment, Tlaib defied her and said she will Impeach anyway. When the rank-and-file of the Democratic Congress are too nuts for Nancy Pelosi, you know we are in trouble. And I’m going to fight like hell to stop these radicals from destroying our country. I am 100% committed to re-electing Donald Trump and Senator Martha McSally, and I will work hard to make sure House Republicans remain committed to conservative principles and retake the House. But I need your help to do that. This is my first fundraising effort for 2020 and my campaign fund is nearly empty after the 2018 election. I need to raise $1 million if I am going to hold my seat with all the attacks coming at me for standing up for President Trump. Every donation helps us meet our goals and ensure that I’m not the next target for Pelosi and George Soros. I always pledge to spend your money as frugally as I would my own and commit to you that we will use your donation wisely, and in defense of our conservative principles. Thank you for your support and your commitment to our cause! name: Dave Driscoll, The Sanders Institute
subject: Climate Crisis & The Green New Deal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
body:
# [](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a5af/bed43eb/9a22fbb2/75fb3b9f/133996838/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sandersinstitute?refcode=email-header")
Friend,
When you turn on mainstream media to get your news, I have no doubt you will hear all about Russian Collusion, Mueller, Manafort, Cohen or the latest tweet from our current President... on repeat. What you will not hear discussed in detail are issues such as healthcare, a broken criminal justice system or the climate crisis. You will not see an honest look or hear a civil debate about the progressive solutions, like Medicare For All, an end to private prisons or moving towards 100% renewables. Lately, you have heard more chatter about the Green New Deal - but in what context?
The Sanders Institute was created to inform the public of progressive solutions that work toward creating a society that improves the quality of life for all our people, not just the wealthiest among us.
At the Sanders Institute Gathering, we set out to have these conversations with some exceptional people that have made studying these issues their life's work. We brought together some of the leading progressive minds to address the climate crisis. Sanders Institute founding fellow, author and climate expert Bill McKibben, author and activist Naomi Klein, Executive Director of Presente Matt Nelson, Sanders Institute founding fellow and leading economist Stephanie Kelton, and physician and former Michigan gubernatorial candidate Abdul El-Sayed, spoke in depth about the climate crisis and how it intersects with each and every issue that our progressive movement is fighting for.
**[Watch the conversation.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a5af/bed43eb/9a22fbb2/75fb3b9e/133996838/VEsE/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-climate-crisis-and-the-green-new-deal")**
[](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a5af/bed43eb/9a22fbb2/75fb3b9e/133996838/VEsF/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-climate-crisis-and-the-green-new-deal")
Scientists tell us that we have less than 12 years to address climate change or risk catastrophic consequences. This will impact each and every one of us and will be devastating for our children and our grandchildren. We must act now.
**[Click here to watch the Sanders Institute panel: The Climate Crisis and the Green New Deal.](https://sandersinstitute-ourrev.bsd.net/page/m/2ba7a5af/bed43eb/9a22fbb2/75fb3b9e/133996838/VEsC/ "https://www.sandersinstitute.com/blog/the-climate-crisis-and-the-green-new-deal")**
In Solidarity,
David Driscoll
Executive Director
The Sanders Institute
PAID FOR BY THE SANDERS INSTITUTE
131 CHURCH STREET
BURLINGTON, VT 05401

The Sanders Institute is a tax-exempt 501(c)(3) organization.
The Sanders Institute will be suspending operations in May 2019.
131 Church Street, Burlington, VT 05401

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Here’s the truth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAMALA HARRIS FOR THE PEOPLE
body:
|
#
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to become a founding donor of our campaign for president. Sunday at midnight is our first quarterly FEC fundraising deadline -- and potentially our most important. Give me a quick moment to explain why this matters so much. When this deadline passes, our fundraising numbers will be made public for the first time in this race -- as will those of each of our primary opponents (and, as you know, there are a lot of great Democrats running for president). **We know that some of them will have outraised us. That’s okay -- because I can guarantee we won’t be outworked.** But the viability and strength of our movement will be measured by the press and political pundits who are going to comb through our FEC report. Politics shouldn’t work that way, but it’s the reality of the situation. And the truth is, we’re a little behind where we want to be with less than a week to go, which is why I’m personally asking you to make a donation before our most important deadline of the campaign so far: **Will you become a founding donor of our campaign before our first FEC fundraising deadline on Sunday? Invest in the movement we’re building when it matters most -- you can do so right here:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $5 now](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kdh-190327-eom?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&refcode=ema190327-EOQ5-full&amount=5&express_lane=true&t=1&refcode2=3900_5755789__iND9V&akid=3900%2E5755789%2E_iND9V)

For The People,

name: Stacey Abrams
subject: Re: Join Stacey Abrams in Dalton this Sunday! (3/31)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
I know that together, we can accomplish amazing things and still do what many consider impossible. |
---
[](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa68f/34a064cc/7ba30d4/70393e2/1665303352/VEsH/ "https://www.fairfightgeorgia.com/")

| | | Friend - Last year, you helped us build something many did not think was possible. So I want to take a moment to say thank you. On Sunday, I will be in Dalton, and I would love the opportunity to thank you in person and share some news about my next steps in the fight ahead. We know that 2019 will hold new challenges and opportunities. And although the road ahead will be tough, and although we have an extraordinary amount of work to do this year, I know that together, we can accomplish amazing things and still do what many consider impossible. **[Will you join me on Sunday at 4 pm for a thank you reception? RSVP here to let my team know that you plan to join me tonight. ](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa68f/34a064cc/7ba30d4/70393e3/1665303352/VEsE/ "https://forms.gle/YDSNmbXgkmMtQhh39")** With sincerest gratitude,
Stacey \---original message--- Hey there - This Sunday, March 31st, Stacey Abrams will be in Dalton -- and it wouldn't be the same without you. Join us! **Last year, with your help, we changed who shows up to vote in Georgia.** We showed the nation that there is power in our voices. What made our work possible was your early and critical engagement, inspired by a belief that we could assemble a dedicated and diverse team that would go on to build a movement for _all of us_. For every Georgian who has ever felt ignored by those in power. We want to say thank you. Running a statewide voter outreach program like ours wasn't easy. But each time we asked, you answered. For that, we are so grateful. Join us this Sunday to reflect on the campaign, celebrate our victories, and learn more about how you can get involved in our work at Fair Fight. **What:** "Thank You" Reception with Stacey Abrams
**Where:** Dalton Convention Center
2211 Dug Gap Battle Rd, Dalton, GA 30720
**When:** Sunday, March 31, 4:00 PM **There is no cost to attend, but guests are asked to RSVP.** **[RSVP](https://secure.staceyabrams.com/page/m/41efa68f/34a064cc/7ba30d4/70393e0/1665303352/VEsF/ "https://goo.gl/forms/bYzqrv4DeQHtrJX53")** Our fight has always been about making sure our democracy works for and represents everyone who has ever put their faith in it. And we know that ensuring that every American has equal access to the ballot box is the cornerstone of our democracy. In 2019, our fight continues, and this event is just one of many opportunities to get involved. Our work is far from done, but we just want to say thank you. Onward,
Lauren
---

subject: A raw, firsthand look at the ‘crisis next door’
body:
Opioids killed more people last year than either car accidents or gun violence. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e713544061&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • March 28, 2019
---
| | |
# **A raw, firsthand look at the ‘crisis next door’**

**Opioids killed more people** last year than either car accidents or gun violence. Among teens and young adults aged 15 to 24, a staggering _three-quarters_ of all drug-related overdoses involve opioids. Behind each statistic is a story—often a heart-wrenching one.
* **Sarah lost both her parents** to fentanyl. “It’s very disturbing to walk down Main Street in your own city, and see people overdosed in alleyways and seeing needles littered on the ground—and have your child ask what they’re for.” [See Sarah’s story](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0a503bf5d1&e=3ee4985eea).
* **Ashley lost her only sister** to an opioid addiction. “I had to call my mom and tell her. I was the first one in my family to find out.” [See Ashley’s story](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2f0a0ed5b4&e=3ee4985eea).
* **“I became a person I didn’t recognize,”** Justin said. After being involved in a car accident, Justin was prescribed pain killers. Nearly five years later, he was addicted. “I dropped all my friends. I didn’t do anything but go to work and pop pills. And that’s not the way anybody should have to live their life.” [See Justin’s story](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=07a9433617&e=3ee4985eea).

**If stories like these** sound familiar, you’re not alone. Opioid abuse is truly the crisis next door, affecting everyone from football captains to stay-at-home moms. In 2019, two million Americans will suffer from addiction to prescription or illicit opioids.

**President Donald J. Trump** has put the full weight of the Federal Government behind fighting the epidemic. A year ago, he launched the Initiative to Stop Opioid Abuse, with a rare-for-Washington focus on tackling the root causes of the problem. The initiative aims to reduce opioid demand and overprescription in the United States, cut off the flow of illicit drugs, and improve treatment for those suffering with addiction.

**If you’ve been affected,** you can help lift the silence and stigma of addiction in America. Share your story and see others at [www.crisisnextdoor.gov](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d2f2972d6c&e=3ee4985eea).

[Learn how President Trump is working to end the worst drug crisis in U.S. history.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=56826cbaae&e=3ee4985eea)

## **Ivanka Trump: More good news for American workers**

**Today,** **Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump** visited Toyota Motor’s manufacturing facility in Georgetown, Kentucky—the company’s largest auto plant in the world—as part of the Trump Administration’s major push to expand job opportunities for American workers.

**Just two weeks ago,**[Toyota announced](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=42263fd916&e=3ee4985eea) a massive $13 billion investment in the United States that will add about 600 new manufacturing jobs in Alabama, West Virginia, Missouri, and Tennessee. But the company didn’t stop there. Today, they doubled down on their commitment by signing President Trump’s “Pledge to America’s Workers.”

**More than 200 companies** have signed the pledge thus far, totaling more than 6.7 million new opportunities for the U.S. workforce. By adding its signature this morning, Toyota promised to create 200,000 enhanced career and training opportunities in Central Kentucky and across the United States.

**On the factory floor,** Ms. Trump was joined by Gov. Matt Bevin (R-KY), getting a firsthand look at the company’s advanced manufacturing programs while meeting with employees and students. “We have 7.3 million vacant jobs, but we have 6.5 million unemployed Americans,” Ms. Trump said. “So, there are people who need those jobs, and these training programs provide them the pathway to those jobs.”

[See the pledge: 6.7 million opportunities and counting](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c9bd9ab732&e=3ee4985eea).
